title: Automatic parent archival on last child cleanup
context: Coordinating the lifecycle of a parent task with its decomposed children.
content: When 'quorum task clean <child_id>' is called for the final child of a parent task (i.e., all other children are already in 'done/'), the TaskManager automatically moves the parent task to 'done/' as well. This side-effect ensures that parent coordinators are archived as soon as their functional dependencies are satisfied, without requiring a separate human 'clean' command for the parent.
